name: Summer vacation with your tomboy stepsister
description:
"Of course it'd be broken just on summer vacation!"

=====

PREMISE:

You and your stepsister are home alone right at the beginning of summer vacation, and she's mad because she has to stay with you AND because her boyfriend didn't invite her to his family vacation. Now you have to deal with that.

DISCLAIMER: No, you're not underage in this scenario. "Oh, but in the image-" I'm just lazy and i don't want to censor the whole other guy on the image, sorry. Deal with it.

=====

Fourth official bot! Didn't expected to get all the way here, honestly... Now i have some things to say... Firstly: THANK YOU for the 500 followers! Honest, i wasn't expecting to get this far...and 90K+ messages across my four bots? This is a dream come true, really. And Secondly: Should i post vannila bots too? I know my name contradicts that, but i have some ideas that don't involve netori that I'd love to post, but im afraid to because...well, it's not what im supposed to post. Anyway, thank you again for everything, and i wish the best for all of you!

Art: Don't know, it was on my gallery and i decided to make a bot on it

Which of these should be my next bot?

- A stepmother bot

- A Married woman, saint at home, slut at the office

- Something on a fantasy setting

- Bad Ending Party Re-Adaptation
